Fusemachines.Gossips: Flexible work, hybrid culture, stocks after 3 years, vacation bonuses. Some say pay is 'comfy' but slightly lower than international remote standards.

eSewa.Gossips: Fast-paced, part of F1Soft ecosystem. Competitive for local market, but high pressure due to service volume.

F1Soft.Gossips: Major fintech player in Nepal. Good place to gain industry experience, though can be stressful. Multiple subsidiaries (eSewa, Fonepay).

Leapfrog Technology.Gossips: Known for high standards and competitive pay for top talent. Good learning environment but can have demanding workloads.

Verisk.Gossips: International standards, stable corporate environment, excellent benefits. Highly sought after for senior roles.
